concept: Announce / To Make a Point Public
description: The formal act of making information known to a community. It implies a level of importance and a responsibility to share information clearly and for the collective good.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'ph' (generative breath), 'o' (wholeness, the collective), 'ka' (to be present), and 'mi' (inner self). The word can be interpreted as 'making the generative breath of the self present to the whole.' Its three-syllable structure gives it a formal, declarative weight.
